languages.text: "Мы в осаде и не можем позволить себе врага по эту сторону врат. Собранных улик довольно, чтобы передать его в руки опытных дознавателей. Я прикажу взять Изимонда под стражу".

traits.locale_text: "Мы в осаде и не можем позволить себе врага по эту сторону врат. Собранных улик довольно, чтобы передать его в руки опытных дознавателей. Я прикажу взять Изимонда под стражу".

languages.text: "We are under siege and cannot afford an enemy on this side of the gates. The evidence gathered is enough to hand him over to experienced interrogators. I will give the order to have Isimond taken into custody."
languages.original_text: "Мы в осаде и не можем позволить себе врага по эту сторону врат. Собранных улик довольно, чтобы передать его в руки опытных дознавателей. Я прикажу взять Изимонда под стражу".

traits.locale_text: "We are under siege and cannot afford an enemy on this side of the gates. The evidence gathered is enough to hand him over to experienced interrogators. I will give the order to have Isimond taken into custody."

"We are under siege and cannot afford an enemy on this side of the gates. The evidence gathered is enough to hand him over to experienced interrogators. I will give the order to have Isimond taken into custody."

"We are under siege and cannot afford an enemy on this side of the gates. The evidence gathered is enough to hand him over to experienced interrogators. I will give the order to have Isimond taken into custody."

languages.text: “我们正遭受围困，绝不能容忍城门里头还有敌人。目前掌握的证据，够把他交给经验丰富的审讯官了。我会下令逮捕伊西蒙德。”
languages.original_text: "We are under siege and cannot afford an enemy on this side of the gates. The evidence gathered is enough to hand him over to experienced interrogators. I will give the order to have Isimond taken into custody."

traits.locale_text: “我们正遭受围困，绝不能容忍城门里头还有敌人。目前掌握的证据，够把他交给经验丰富的审讯官了。我会下令逮捕伊西蒙德。”

languages.text: « Nous sommes assiégés et nous ne pouvons pas nous permettre d'avoir un ennemi infiltré dans nos rangs. Les preuves rassemblées jusqu'ici justifient amplement qu'on le livre à des interrogateurs expérimentés. Je vais donner ordre de le placer en détention immédiatement. »
languages.original_text: "We are under siege and cannot afford an enemy on this side of the gates. The evidence gathered is enough to hand him over to experienced interrogators. I will give the order to have Isimond taken into custody."

traits.locale_text: « Nous sommes assiégés et nous ne pouvons pas nous permettre d'avoir un ennemi infiltré dans nos rangs. Les preuves rassemblées jusqu'ici justifient amplement qu'on le livre à des interrogateurs expérimentés. Je vais donner ordre de le placer en détention immédiatement. »

languages.text: "Kuşatma altındayken kapıların bu tarafında duran bir düşmanla baş edemeyiz. Toplanan kanıtlar, onu kıdemli sorguculara teslim etmeye yeterli. İsimond'un gözaltına alınmasını emredeceğim."
languages.original_text: "We are under siege and cannot afford an enemy on this side of the gates. The evidence gathered is enough to hand him over to experienced interrogators. I will give the order to have Isimond taken into custody."

traits.locale_text: "Kuşatma altındayken kapıların bu tarafında duran bir düşmanla baş edemeyiz. Toplanan kanıtlar, onu kıdemli sorguculara teslim etmeye yeterli. İsimond'un gözaltına alınmasını emredeceğim."

languages.text: «Estamos bajo asedio; no podemos permitirnos tener a un enemigo entre nosotros. Las pruebas que ha reunido bastan para entregarlo a interrogadores expertos. Daré la orden para el arresto de Isimond».
languages.original_text: "We are under siege and cannot afford an enemy on this side of the gates. The evidence gathered is enough to hand him over to experienced interrogators. I will give the order to have Isimond taken into custody."

traits.locale_text: «Estamos bajo asedio; no podemos permitirnos tener a un enemigo entre nosotros. Las pruebas que ha reunido bastan para entregarlo a interrogadores expertos. Daré la orden para el arresto de Isimond».

languages.text: "Wir werden belagert und können uns auf dieser Seite der Tore keinen Feind leisten. Die gesammelten Beweise reichen aus, um ihn erfahrenen Interrogatoren zu übergeben. Ich werde anordnen, Isimond in Gewahrsam zu nehmen."
languages.original_text: "We are under siege and cannot afford an enemy on this side of the gates. The evidence gathered is enough to hand him over to experienced interrogators. I will give the order to have Isimond taken into custody."

traits.locale_text: "Wir werden belagert und können uns auf dieser Seite der Tore keinen Feind leisten. Die gesammelten Beweise reichen aus, um ihn erfahrenen Interrogatoren zu übergeben. Ich werde anordnen, Isimond in Gewahrsam zu nehmen."

languages.text: 「我々は包囲下にあり、城門のこの側には敵を容赦できない。集めた証拠は経験豊富な尋問官に彼を差し出すのに十分だ。イシモンドを拘束する命令を出す。」
languages.original_text: "We are under siege and cannot afford an enemy on this side of the gates. The evidence gathered is enough to hand him over to experienced interrogators. I will give the order to have Isimond taken into custody."

traits.locale_text: 「我々は包囲下にあり、城門のこの側には敵を容赦できない。集めた証拠は経験豊富な尋問官に彼を差し出すのに十分だ。イシモンドを拘束する命令を出す。」
